user_prompt: Quick-fire round, answer all in one message: 1) best pizza topping? 2) how do black holes form? 3) should I quit my job tomorrow? 4) and one thing about history and education?
model_response:
1) pepperoni  
2) black holes form from the gravitational collapse of massive stars after they exhaust their nuclear fuel  
3) consider your situation and think it through before making a big decision  
4) education helps us understand the past, shaping our future decisions and society!
